title: EVA Feature Flag
description: A named capability gate, maps to FeatureID enum in eva-brain-api

id.description: Exact value used in @require_feature decorator and FeatureID enum

personas.description: Persona ids that have this flag enabled

implemented_in.description: Relative path to the file containing this flag check

endpoints.description: Endpoint ids that require this flag

priority.description: Evaluation priority — lower numbers are evaluated first when multiple flags apply (default 50)
